---
title: "database.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.ts"
loc: 139
complexity: 8
logic_score: 3.15
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 6.32
overall_score: 4.93
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 22 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://better-sqlite3)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [AgentPing](file://../types.js)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `db`
- `getDb`
- `getDb`
- `statsDir`
- `dbPath`
- `saveTrace`
- `saveTrace`
- `database`
- `stmt`
- `registerSpoke`
- `registerSpoke`
- `database`
- `normalizedRepo`
- `spokeName`
- `spoke`
- `stmt`
- `result`
- `savePing`
- `savePing`
- `sanitizedAgentId`
- `validActions`
- `sanitizedAction`
- `spokeId`
- `database`
- `oneHourAgo`
- `session`
- `stmt`
- `result`
- `insertPing`
- `getSessionsWithSummaries`
- `getSessionsWithSummaries`
- `database`
- `normalizedRepo`
- `sessions`
- `duration`
- `targetFile`
- `getTracesForFile`
- `getTracesForFile`
- `database`
- `normalizedPath`
- `getSessionPings`
- `getSessionPings`
- `database`
